title: The Wedding Trap Is Set
description: On pages 15–15, this part focuses on the main characters as The wedding ceremony and tea party begin, with Big Mom’s enemies preparing to strike.
scene: The wedding begins under Big Mom’s watch, with hidden assassination plans moving beneath the ceremony.
summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins storyline with 11 dialogue beats. The wedding and tea party begin, placing Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom, Bege and the Straw Hats on a collision course.
